demo.name: Pearl
description: However, this small, round, sturdy item may be useful elsewhere.

demo.name: Copper Bullet
description: A plain copper ball. No promises it will fly true, but it is decent enough.

demo.name: Stone Bullet
description: A lump of stone that only just passes for a ball. You will only hit true at close range.

demo.name: Homemade Gunpowder
description: Low-quality homemade gunpowder. Use with caution.
Ground on millstones from ash and sulfur.

demo.name: Iron Bullet
description: A well-made iron bullet with good ballistics.
